title: goeppertia altissima
intro: Goeppertia altissima, also known as Calathea altissima, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Marantaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Goeppertia altissima include reducing inflammation and preventing infections, making it a useful treatment for conditions such as fever and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used topically as a paste to accelerate healing and reduce pain.
